positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a celestial compass. The central subject is a stylized constellation forming a geometric star pattern, surrounded by delicate, swirling nebula clouds and clean, visible planetary orbits. The style should be neo-geometric and etherial, resembling modern scientific illustration mixed with deep-sea bioluminescence. Composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring strong contrast between deep cosmic indigo/midnight blue and glowing, metallic gold/iridescent teal accents. The design should have crisp, clean lines and silhouettes suitable for textile printing, with a vibrant luminosity against a dark background. Trending on ArtStation, vector art style, detailed linework, high contrast, centered emblem design.
